title: Game Suit
description: This mod adds New Weapons, new Items, and new blocks!
body:
This mod, Gamesuit, adds new Weapons, Items, and blocks to enhance the Vanilla gameplay experience.

This Mod Adds things such as: Edged Sticks, a Dirt Sword, Graphite Ore, Ingots, And Tools, Pencils, Drawings, Wallets, Food, and many more new and exciting things to come
